scripts.install:all: NODE_ENV=development && node scripts/ensure-submodules.js quickforge && concurrently "yarn install:web" "yarn install:mini" "yarn install:quickforge" "yarn install:electron"
scripts.install:quickforge: node scripts/ensure-submodules.js quickforge && (cd quickforge && yarn install)
scripts.dev:quickforge: node scripts/ensure-submodules.js quickforge && (cd quickforge && yarn dev)
scripts.dev:all: node scripts/ensure-submodules.js quickforge && concurrently "yarn dev:web" "yarn dev:mini" "yarn dev:quickforge" "yarn dev:electron"
scripts.publishAli2:electron-v0: (cd electron && echo '需要去`electron`项目内去执行多条命令' && open ./README.md)
